messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.body:
Here is a summary of the Q1 2026 Sales Report:

- Total Revenue: $2.4M (up 15% quarter-over-quarter)
- New Customers: 142
- Churn Rate: 3.2%
- Top Product: Enterprise Plan (accounting for 68% of revenue)

Let me know if you need any further details.
arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary

content.delta: I've read the Q1 2026 sales report and emailed the summary to bob@example.com with the subject "Q1 Sales Summary". The email includes the total revenue ($2.4M, up 15% QoQ), new customer count (142), churn rate (3.2%), and the top product (Enterprise Plan at 68% of revenue).
